response.justification: Bogdan is a Staff/Senior engineer with 14+ years of full-stack experience (exceeds 6+ requirement) and current role at re:cinq perfectly aligns with job needs: TypeScript/Node.js, React, AI agent infrastructure, and MCP development. Strong TDD culture and testing expertise evident. Primary gap is Nest.js—not explicitly mentioned despite being in primary stack—but his deep Node.js background makes this readily learnable. Proven architecture skills and current tech stack position make him a compelling candidate.
strengths: 14+ years of full-stack engineering with Staff/Senior-level roles in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI agent infrastructure—current position at re:cinq directly matches job scope
Extensive testing and TDD expertise: organized Refactoring Dojos, created Fluent-Asserts and Trial testing libraries, applied TDD at RIDE Capital—aligns with testing framework requirements
Proven architecture and problem-solving across databases (MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL), cloud platforms (AWS CDK), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and security practices
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned on resume despite being in primary tech stack; Node.js experience is deep but framework-specific gap exists
Vitest not called out in resume; strong Jest/testing culture evident but Vitest specifically (in primary stack) is not demonstrated
Kotlin experience not listed; Java mentioned minimally. Secondary stack requirement for Kotlin/Java partially unfulfilled
